name: Citrus Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Beat egg in a small bowl; stir in milk, butter, and orange peel.
3. Add to flour mixture; stir just until moistened. (The batter will be lumpy.)
4. Stir in the cereal.
5. Spoon batter into greased or paper-lined muffin pan, filling each cup 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
7. Makes 24 to 30 miniature muffins. Spray pan with non-stick cooking spray. Bake for 15 minutes.
